nasb.text: Woe to the wicked! It will go badly with him, For what he deserves will be done to him.

esv.text: Woe to the wicked! It shall be ill with him, for what his hands have dealt out shall be done to him.

cnv.text: 惡人卻有禍了，他們必遭災難， 因為他們必按自己手所作的得報應。

ccb.text: 恶人有祸了！他们必大祸临头， 受到报应。

csbs.text: 恶人却有祸了， 他们必遭灾难， 因为他们手所做的必回报在自己身上。
